# Transcript
ARC
TA*
MA*EYE
TANEIA
S DAIPPO
EIPEN
AI TWI D**
O* *ON SIKE
QOS PERI T*N
OS *YMMACOYSEI
YS EKGONOYS
ON AEI CRONON
HN CWRAN THN A
A *HN H KA*A QAL
KAI TOYS E*GON
LLWSIN AQHNA*
*ATTAN PANT
EAN TIS IHI E
S AYTO H OSWN A
H KATA GHN H K*
**OYS KAQOTI A 
** *** **** QAL*
O **NATON OPLA
D**NYSIWI MHD
*** CWRAN T*N A
K*** GHN MHTE K
O** EXEINAI OP
**N MHDE TOY EK
C*I DIONYSIOS
M*TE KATA QALA
O* PERI THS SYM
* PARA DIONY S*
BOYLHN KAI TO
RCOYS KAI TO
*YSION KAI TO*
*WN SYRAKOSI
*ARCOYS OMNY
*TE*OYS TOY
*N TOS PRESB
AN ANAGRAU
*A*** ***
